summary: Let AI block distractions for you when you need to lock in Discussion | Link
content: LockIn MCP is the first distraction block built for the AI agent era. Rather than using a bypassable Chrome extension, you now just tell your favourite agent to block distractions for you, and it can do it natively. No bypassing, pure focus.
chineseSummary: 当您需要锁定讨论时，让 AI 为您屏蔽干扰 |关联
chineseContent: LockIn MCP 是第一个专为 AI 代理时代构建的干扰块。现在，您无需使用可绕过的 Chrome 扩展程序，只需告诉您最喜欢的代理为您阻止干扰，它就可以在本地完成此操作。没有旁路，纯粹的专注。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
